ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "first_sentence" TEXT /* First sentence of the book */,
  "published" INTEGER /* Year the book was published */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the book */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the book belongs to */,
  "pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the book */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN of the book */,
  "book_type" TEXT /* Type of the book (e.g., novel, short story) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "author_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the author */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "author_genres" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role assigned to the user (e.g., admin, moderator, member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_ratings" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the book (based on user reviews) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_formats" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the book (e.g., paperback, e-book, audiobook) */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the book in the given format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id", "format")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_awards" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id", "award_name", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "author_followers" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who follows the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_shelves" (
  "shelf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bookshelf */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the bookshelf */,
  "shelf_name" TEXT /* Name of the bookshelf */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shelf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_shelves_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shelf_books" (
  "shelf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bookshelf */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shelf_id", "book_id")
)
